overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in dark robes exploring a dimly lit gothic castle interior. The character walks through a grand hall with vaulted ceilings and stone columns before turning into a side corridor with tall windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle grand hall with vaulted ceiling

tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
tall stone columns supporting the vaulted ceiling
lit wall-mounted lanterns with metal frames on stone pedestals
lit wall-mounted lanterns with metal frames on stone pedestals
collection of framed portraits mounted on the wall above the archway

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a spacious gothic grand hall with a high vaulted ceiling and massive stone pillars. Warm lantern light illuminates the stone floor as the character approaches a large archway adorned with portraits at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with tall lancet windows

events.description: character turns left into the side corridor away from the central archway

agents.ego_description: turning left and proceeding along the windowed corridor past stone benches

entered.detail: tall narrow gothic windows with decorative lattice patterns allowing blue light
wooden benches lined against the wall beneath the windows
ornate stone railing with gothic tracery patterns

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower corridor lined with tall gothic windows on the left side. The space features stone benches beneath the windows and an ornate carved balustrade on the right, while the grand hall and archway fall behind and out of view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the expansive openness of a gothic grand hall into the intimate confinement of a side corridor. It begins by tracking the character through a spacious hall characterized by high vaulted ceilings and massive stone pillars, with warm lantern light reflecting off the stone floor. As the character approaches a large archway adorned with portraits, the camera follows a leftward turn that shifts the environment from the grand scale of the hall to a narrower passage. The scene then opens into a corridor lined with tall gothic windows and stone benches, while the ornate carved balustrade on the right guides the movement. Finally, the grand hall and its archway recede and fall out of view as the character moves deeper into the windowed gallery.
